task_completion.description: Verify the new sales tax 'NY Combined Sales Tax 8.875%' was created with the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tax configuration screen or list in Odoo showing the tax name 'NY Combined Sales Tax 8.875%' and the amount '8.875%'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Office Standing Desk' is configured to use only the new NY tax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product form for 'Office Standing Desk' showing 'Customer Taxes' set to 'NY Combined Sales Tax 8.875%' with no other taxes listed.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Ergonomic Task Chair' is configured to use only the new NY tax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product form for 'Ergonomic Task Chair' showing 'Customer Taxes' set to 'NY Combined Sales Tax 8.875%' with no other taxes listed.

task_completion.description: Verify an invoice is created for 'Riverside Office Solutions' with the correct products and quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an invoice screen showing the customer 'Riverside Office Solutions' and invoice lines containing 4 units of 'Office Standing Desk' and 6 units of 'Ergonomic Task Chair'.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice calculates the correct subtotal, tax, and total amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the invoice totals section showing a subtotal of $5,330.00, tax of $473.04, and total of $5,803.04.
Look for the invoice status showing 'Posted' (often a green banner or ribbon) or the presence of a 'Register Payment' button indicating it is no longer a draft.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web UI in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database clients.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for filled input fields, dropdown selections, and standard Odoo interface elements rather than text pasted into a notepad or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client or script to insert records directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands (like psql) or Python scripts to bypass the Odoo UI.
